allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('./script-data.js'\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$c=0} $c += s/<span style=\\\\"display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient\\\(135deg,#fb923c,#ea580c\\\);color:white;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba\\\(234,88,12,0.3\\\)\\\\">🎯 \([^<]+?\)<\\/span>\\\\n\\\\n/<div class=\\\\"cc-sub-banner\\\\">$1<\\/div>\\\\n/g; END{print STDERR "replaced: $c\\n"}' script-data.js)
